topic: In China employee termination — Pulse-style daily brief for foreign employers
primary_keyword: China employee termination update for foreign employers
theme_clusters: Legal baseline: route-based termination model, not at-will
Execution risk: evidence quality and cross-function consistency
Business impact: cost, timing, dispute exposure, governance overhead
Action model: fast briefing first, legal appendix second

sources.title: Labor Contract Law of the People's Republic of China
sources.fit_note: Primary legal anchor for termination routes and consequences.

sources.title: Regulations for the Implementation of the Labor Contract Law of the PRC (State Council Decree No. 535)
Interpretation of the Supreme People's Court on Issues Concerning the Application of Law in the Trial of Labor Dispute Cases (I)
Employee Termination in China: A Guide for Employers
sources.fit_note: Practical translation layer for foreign operators.

sources.title: Key Recent Developments in China's Employment Law: A China-U.S. Comparative Perspective for Multinational Employers

sources.title: People's Republic of China - Individual taxes on personal income
sources.fit_note: Business context source for payroll-facing treatment awareness in offboarding periods.

source_fit_assessment: Source mix meets rule: official/legal + practitioner + market/business context + practical interpretation. Weak generic sources not used.
uncertainties: City-level implementation and evidentiary emphasis can vary.
Edge-case payment component handling may require local confirmation.
Official English texts may lag current Chinese-language nuance.
